title: Signal handlers should have the Receiver decorator on top of all other decorators
description: This rule checks if Django signal handlers have the Receiver decorator at the top of all other decorators.
message: Signal handler function should have the Receiver decorator at the top of all other decorators.
recommendation: Apply the Receiver decorator at the top of all other decorators in signal handler functions.

noncompliant.description: Custom decorator is not on top of the Receiver decorator.

compliant.description: Receiver decorator is at the top of all other decorators.

why_is_this_an_issue: Using the Receiver decorator at the top of all other decorators ensures that the signal handler is registered correctly and follows Django's conventions.
how_to_fix: Reorder the decorators in the signal handler function so that the Receiver decorator is at the top.
